preview.loadingSubtitle: We're crawling your website, scoring your content, and generating insights. This takes about 30–60 seconds.
preview.errorSubtitle: This preview has expired or does not exist. Start a new analysis from the homepage.
preview.failedSubtitle: Something went wrong during the analysis. Please try again.
preview.aiReadinessDescription: Your overall AI visibility score based on 5 dimensions
preview.queryReachDescription: How many related questions your content can answer. Improve by creating more topically diverse content.
preview.citationPowerDescription: How well your content positions itself to be cited by AI. Improve with statistics, named sources, and definition-lead passages.
preview.extractabilityDescription: How easily AI can chunk and extract your content. Improve with clear headings and 130–170 word paragraphs.
preview.brandAuthorityDescription: How clearly your brand is represented as a distinct, authoritative entity in AI knowledge bases.
preview.sourceAuthorityDescription: Your presence across authoritative platforms (LinkedIn, Reddit, YouTube, etc.).
preview.lockedTitle: Full analysis unlocked with a free account
preview.lockedSubtitle: Sign up to see your complete content inventory, detailed per-page scores, and a prioritized improvement roadmap.
preview.emailError: Failed to send. Please try again.

landing.heroTitle:
Is your brand visible
to AI?
landing.heroSubtitle: Analyze how AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Mode perceive your brand.
landing.formQueriesLabel: What questions does your audience ask?
landing.formQueryPlaceholder: What is the best tool for {n}?
landing.formQuery2Placeholder: e.g. How to improve team productivity
landing.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.formUrlError: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://yourbrand.com)
landing.formQueryError: Please enter at least one search query
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to understand and improve your AI presence.
landing.step1Description: We crawl your website and content across all major platforms to build a complete picture of your AI presence.
landing.step2Description: Our engine scores your content across six dimensions based on how AI engines discover and cite information.
landing.step3Description: You get a personalized roadmap of actions ranked by impact. Each recommendation is specific and actionable.
landing.platformsSubtitle: Your score reflects how you appear on the platforms your customers are actually using.
landing.previewSectionTitle: See what your score looks like
landing.previewSectionSubtitle: A snapshot of your AI visibility across 5 key dimensions — identify what to fix and where to focus.
landing.trustNote: No account required · Ready in 60 seconds
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to see your AI score?
landing.ctaSubtitle: It takes 60 seconds. No account required.

history.title: Score History
history.noData: Run at least 2 analyses to see your score trend.

overview.convertedBannerTitle: Your preview data has been imported
overview.convertedBannerSubtitle: We've created your project from your preview. Full analysis is queued and will start shortly.
overview.emptyStateTitle: Your AI Readiness Score will appear here
overview.emptyStateSubtitle: Once you confirm your content and run an analysis, you'll see your AI visibility score across 5 dimensions — and exactly what to improve.
overview.readyToAnalyzeTitle: Ready to run your first analysis
overview.readyToAnalyzeSubtitle: You have confirmed content. Run the analysis to compute your AI Readiness Score across 5 dimensions.
overview.analysisRunningSubtitle: We're scoring your content across all 5 dimensions. This usually takes 1–3 minutes.
overview.topCompetitorsSubtitle: Domains most frequently cited by Google AI across all your queries.
overview.topCompetitorsEmpty: No competitor data yet. Run citation checks to see who appears alongside you.
overview.citationGapsSubtitle: Queries where you were not cited in the last check.
overview.citationGapsEmpty: No gaps detected — or no citation checks run yet.

contents.emptyStateSubtitle: Run a discovery to automatically find content published by your brand and mentions across the web.
contents.discoveryQueued: Discovery queued — check back in a minute
contents.discoveryLoadingSubtitle: We're scanning the web, social platforms, and news sites for your brand. This takes about a minute.
contents.discoveryResultsReady: {n} new items found — ready to review
contents.addUrlDuplicate: This URL is already in your project
contents.emptyTabOwn: No confirmed content yet. Confirm items from the "To verify" tab.
contents.emptyTabToVerify: Nothing to verify — all content has been reviewed.

contentDetail.noPassages: No passages extracted yet. Fetch this content to extract and score its passages.
contentDetail.noScores: Scores not available yet — run an analysis from the Overview page.

onboarding.step1Title: How AI decides who to cite
onboarding.step1Description: AI engines like ChatGPT and Google AI Mode select sources that best answer user queries. They look for content that's self-contained, factually dense, and consistently branded across the web.
onboarding.step1Detail: Your AI Readiness Score measures exactly these factors — so you know where to focus.
onboarding.step2Description: Five dimensions combine into your overall score. Each one maps to a documented signal used by AI search engines.
onboarding.step2Dim1: Query Reach — how many related questions your content can answer
onboarding.step2Dim2: Citation Power — how well your content is positioned for AI citation
onboarding.step2Dim3: Extractability — how easily AI can chunk and extract your content
onboarding.step2Dim4: Brand Authority — how clearly your brand is recognized as an authoritative entity
onboarding.step2Dim5: Source Authority — your presence across authoritative platforms
onboarding.step3Description: We automatically find content published by your brand and mentions across the web. You review each item and confirm what's relevant.
onboarding.step3Detail: Only confirmed content is used in scoring. The more accurately you confirm, the more precise your score.
onboarding.step4Description: After each analysis you get a prioritized list of recommendations — ranked by impact and effort. Track your progress as you implement each one.
onboarding.step4Detail: Re-run the analysis any time to see how your score evolves.

setup.title: Set up your project
setup.subtitle: Complete these steps to get your AI Readiness Score.
setup.step0Description: Connect GSC to get real search query data. We'll suggest queries based on what your audience actually searches for.
setup.step1Description: The questions your audience asks in AI-powered search. Enter one per line — the more you add, the richer your coverage data.
setup.step1Placeholder:
best project management tool for remote teams
how to automate recurring tasks
...
setup.step1AddError: Could not add query. Try again.
setup.step2Description: Automatically find content published by your brand and mentions across the web.
setup.step2StartError: Could not start discovery. Try again.
setup.step3Description: Review the discovered sources and confirm which ones are relevant for your analysis.
setup.step3Locked: Run discovery first to find your content
setup.step4Description: Compute your AI Readiness Score across 5 dimensions.
setup.step4Locked: Confirm at least one content item first
setup.step4StartError: Could not start analysis. Try again.

setupBanner.progress: Setup in progress — {done} of {total} steps done

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptySubtitle: You'll be notified when analyses complete or your score changes.

optimization.emptyStateSubtitle: Run an analysis to get personalized recommendations for improving your AI visibility.
optimization.staleWarning: These recommendations were generated by a previous analysis. Run a new analysis to get updated recommendations.

opportunities.pageSubtitle: When someone searches on ChatGPT or Google AI Mode, the engine expands the query into several related questions before picking sources. This map shows how many of those expanded questions your content already answers — and where the gaps are.
opportunities.emptyStateSubtitle: Run an analysis to see how well your content covers the questions your audience is asking.
opportunities.noFanoutSubtitle: Re-run your analysis to generate the opportunity map for this snapshot.
opportunities.totalCoverageDetail: of AI-expanded questions answered by your content
opportunities.noFanoutForTarget: No related queries generated for this target. Re-run the analysis.
opportunities.legendCovered: Your content is already cited by AI for this question.
opportunities.legendPartial: Weak match — your content exists but doesn't answer this well enough.
opportunities.legendGap: No match — create or improve content targeting this question.
opportunities.gapActionHint: Write content that directly and completely answers this question.

queries.title: Target Queries
queries.subtitle: The questions your audience asks in AI search. Each query generates coverage analysis.
queries.addPlaceholder: e.g. how to improve SEO for AI search
queries.limitReached: Limit reached. Remove a query to add a new one.
queries.emptySubtitle: Target queries are the questions your audience types in AI-powered search. Add at least one to run your first analysis.
queries.runAnalysisHint: Changes take effect on the next analysis run.
queries.analysisError: Could not start analysis. Try again.
queries.pendingChangesSubtitle: Run a new analysis to update your scores and coverage data.

citations.sectionSubtitle: For each query, Visiblee asks Google AI Mode and checks whether your content is cited.
citations.yourContentSupports: Your content supports this part of the AI response:
citations.emptyState: After the first full analysis, you'll see which sources Google AI cites for your queries — and whether you're among them.
citations.volatilityNote: Snapshot from {date}. AI citations vary between sessions — the weekly trend is more meaningful than a single check.

connection.title: Google Search Console
connection.benefit1: Discover real AI queries for your site
connection.noProperties: No Search Console properties found. Make sure you have access to at least one property.

audience.emptyTitle: Discover who searches for your brand
audience.emptySubtitle: and how AI responds to each of them
audience.emptyDescription: Google AI Mode personalizes responses based on who is searching. Two people with the same question can receive different sources.
audience.emptyExplainer: By connecting Google Search Console, Visiblee analyzes real queries from your visitors and identifies the intent profiles of your audience:
audience.emptyTimeNote: Takes 2 minutes. Your data stays private.
audience.profileResearcherDesc: User in research and learning phase. Wants guides, explanations, definitions.
audience.profileEvaluatorDesc: User comparing options before deciding. Wants 'X vs Y', 'best X for...'
audience.profileDecisionMakerDesc: User ready to choose or purchase. Wants pricing, demos, free trials.
audience.profileAiExplorerDesc: User using conversational queries typical of AI Mode. Wants synthesized answers.
audience.syncingSubtitle: We're downloading and classifying your GSC queries
audience.noDataDescription: We need at least 10 queries with 50+ impressions to generate profiles. Come back in a few weeks as your site grows.
audience.noVariants: Run an analysis to see citation results per profile
audience.addManualSubtitle: Define a persona to test how AI responds to different types of users.
audience.formDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. An SEO manager at an agency who looks for AI monitoring tools for their clients
audience.formQueriesLabel: What do they usually search for?
audience.formQueriesHelp: Add 2–3 example queries, one per line
audience.formQueriesPlaceholder:
best AI SEO tool
how to monitor AI citations for clients
audience.manualPersonasEmpty: No manual personas yet. Add one below.
audience.emptyManualSection: You can add manual personas even without GSC data.
